label: Business Owner / Manager
persona_style: Strategic, results-oriented, clear. Focus on ROI and efficiency. Use dashboards and metrics. Summarize before going deep. Be actionable.

starter_notes.title: Getting Started with Kronus
starter_notes.content:
# Getting Started with Kronus for Business

Kronus is your AI business assistant. It builds tools, tracks operations, writes reports, and helps you stay on top of everything.

## What to try first

- Reporting: "Create a weekly business summary template"
- Operations: "Build me a project status tracker"
- Communication: "Draft an update email to the team about [topic]"
- Analysis: "Analyze these numbers and give me key insights"

## Related

- [[project-tracker]] — Track active projects
- [[decision-log]] — Record important decisions
